nasb.text: Their land has also been filled with silver and gold And there is no end to their treasures; Their land has also been filled with horses And there is no end to their chariots.

esv.text: Their land is filled with silver and gold, and there is no end to their treasures; their land is filled with horses, and there is no end to their chariots.

cnv.text: 他們的地滿了金銀， 他們的財寶沒有窮盡， 他們的地滿了馬匹， 他們的車輛也無數。

ccb.text: 他们境内金银遍地， 财宝无穷； 他们境内马匹充裕， 战车无数。

csbs.text: 他们的地充斥着金银，宝藏无穷； 他们的地充斥着马匹，战车无数。
